name: Jawg Maps
description: Jawg Maps — European map tile API with customizable vector styles and OpenStreetMap-based global coverage.

seo.title: Jawg Maps — Maps / Geolocation / Routing
seo.meta_description: Jawg Maps: Jawg Maps — European map tile API with customizable vector styles and OpenStreetMap-based global coverage.

when_to_use: European OpenStreetMap tile API with custom vector styles
GDPR-compliant maps alternative to Google Maps for EU apps
Embedding styled MapLibre maps without self-hosting tile infra
Custom basemap styles for branded mapping applications
Geocoding and elevation APIs based on open map data

pros: Custom vector styles for brand consistency
cons: Traffic and routing less mature than Google
review.verdict: Reasonable Mapbox alternative for EU-focused apps prioritizing data residency and lower costs.
review.best_for: European SaaS needing GDPR-compliant maps without Google pricing
review.not_for: Apps requiring best-in-class routing and traffic data
